close_reason: Removed logs_by_id from FinalizationPlan, updated push_to_logs to use log_services, changed push_transaction_to_logs_direct from 5-arg to 4-arg signature
description:
Remove transaction_system_layout from finalization, use RoutingData for everything.

## Current Usage

finalize_batch/4 receives TSL and uses:
- TSL.logs for building log_map (now in routing_data)
- TSL.services for looking up log PIDs (now in routing_data.log_services)

## Changes to finalization.ex

1. Remove TSL from finalize_batch signature:
   ```elixir
   # Old
   def finalize_batch(batch, transaction_system_layout, resolver_layout, opts)
   
   # New  
   def finalize_batch(batch, resolver_layout, routing_data, opts)
   ```

2. Update FinalizationPlan:
   - Remove `logs_by_id` field
   - Uses routing_data fields (shard_table, log_map, log_services, replication_factor)

3. In `build_transactions_for_logs`:
   - Use `Map.values(routing_data.log_map)` for log list

4. In `push_to_logs`:
   - Use `routing_data.log_services[log_id]` to get log ref
   - No separate metadata map needed

## Key Code Change

```elixir
defp push_to_logs(plan) do
  log_ids = Map.values(plan.log_map) |> Enum.uniq()
  
  logs_with_refs = Enum.map(log_ids, fn log_id ->
    {log_id, Map.fetch!(plan.log_services, log_id)}
  end)
  
  # Push to each log...
end
```

## Testing

- Update finalization tests to not pass TSL
- Verify routing uses routing_data fields
- Verify push uses routing_data.log_services
title: Finalization: Remove TSL param, use log_map and log_services
